parameters.query:
SELECT access_token, expires_at
FROM zalo_token_store
WHERE is_active = TRUE
  AND token_type = 'oa_access'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('[zalo_webhook_v3] incoming payload', $('Zalo Webhook').item.json.body);
return items;

parameters.query:
WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO invoice_log (
    zalo_user_id,
    zalo_msg_id,
    supplier_code,
    source_type,
    source_url,
    parsed_data,
    status,
    error_details,
    processing_time_ms,
    created_at
  ) VALUES (
    COALESCE('{{$('Verify Signature Async').item.json.sender_id}}', 'unknown'),
    NULLIF('{{$('Verify Signature Async').item.json.zalo_msg_id}}', ''),
    'zalo_webhook_receiver_v3',
    'xml',
    'workflow://Zalo Webhook Receiver V3',
    jsonb_build_object('event', 'signature_failed', 'reason', '{{$json.reason || "invalid_signature"}}'),
    'failed',
    'E001: Zalo signature verification failed',
    0,
    NOW()
  )
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO ops_events (ts, level, workflow, event_type, message, context)
VALUES (NOW(), 'warn', 'zalo_webhook_receiver_v3', 'invalid_signature', 'Webhook signature rejected; processing stopped', jsonb_build_object('zalo_user_id', '{{$('Verify Signature Async').item.json.sender_id}}', 'zalo_msg_id', '{{$('Verify Signature Async').item.json.zalo_msg_id}}', 'reason', '{{$json.reason || "invalid_signature"}}'));
SELECT id, status FROM invoice_log WHERE zalo_user_id='{{$json.sender_id}}' AND zalo_msg_id='{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}' AND status <> 'failed' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO ops_events (ts, level, workflow, event_type, message, context) VALUES (NOW(), 'warn', 'zalo_webhook_receiver_v3', 'replay_blocked', 'Blocked duplicated zalo_msg_id from webhook', jsonb_build_object('zalo_user_id', '{{$json.sender_id}}', 'zalo_msg_id', '{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}'));
